refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: detections = dnn_decode_yolo(output, imageSize) detections = dnn_decode_yolo(output, imageSize, confThreshold, nmsThreshold) detections = dnn_decode_yolo(output, imageSize, confThreshold, nmsThreshold, "yolox", inputSize, strides)

listitem.para: Network input size for YOLOX decoding as [width height]. Default is [640 640].
Structure with boxes, scores, and classIds.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: dnn_decode_yolo converts YOLO-like network output to image-space bounding boxes. The default decoder expects rows of [cx cy w h objectness class...] normalized to the image size. The "yolox" decoder applies the grid and stride transform used by OpenCV Zoo YOLOX models.

refsection.title: Examples
